title: CBB Rulebook Volume 2 Digital Financial Advice Module
summary: Applies automated-advice governance controls to Islamic bank licensees, including algorithm design, monitoring, client suitability, disclosure, data protection, and responsibility for advice generated by digital systems.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Regulates algorithmic robo-advice by Islamic bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Personal Data Protection Law No. 30 of 2018 and CBB Rulebook Volume 2
